parameters: I didn't think we were ever going to make it
I, for one, certainly don't remember
encountering nearly as many monsters on our way
Let's head to the Bastion to report our
findings. Maybe the powers that be will
They say Duskhaven is safe now. Must be nice.
I used to complain about wagon traffic. I miss wagon
My brother says he saw a monster bigger than a cart. I think
he is lying. I hope he is lying.
